nasb.text: And you will swear, ‘As the Lord lives,’ In truth, in justice and in righteousness; Then the nations will bless themselves in Him, And in Him they will glory.”

esv.text: and if you swear, ‘As the Lord lives,’ in truth, in justice, and in righteousness, then nations shall bless themselves in him, and in him shall they glory.”

cnv.text: 如果你憑真理、公正、公義， 指著永活的耶和華起誓； 列國就必因耶和華蒙福， 也必以他為榮。”

ccb.text: 如果你本着诚实、正直、公义， 凭永活的耶和华起誓， 你必成为万国的祝福， 得到他们的尊敬。”
